title: Real Estate Listing & Home-Buying Platform
summary: Built a real estate platform with organized, consistent listing forms for sellers and guided step-by-step forms for buyers, replacing scattered/inconsistent listings and an unclear buying process with a clear, well-organized path from search to closing.
results: Simplified listing management for sellers with consistent, complete property data.
Easier home search and a clearer step-by-step buying process for buyers.
Reduced mismatched/incomplete listing information across the platform.
